checklist.detail: the project verify command was GREEN
checklist.label: Verification passed

checklist.detail: committed locally on the build branch
checklist.label: Work committed

checklist.detail: Exports estimateReadingTime(text, wordsPerMinute=200): number from the same module, uses wordCount internally, Math.ceil rounding, returns 0 for empty/whitespace, default 200 wpm — fully matches the acceptance criteria and definition of done.
checklist.label: Implements the approved plan

checklist.detail: Only 3 files changed: new implementation file, one-line re-export in index.ts, and a new test block appended to index.test.ts with a minor header update. No unrelated churn.
checklist.label: Minimal and scoped

checklist.detail: Tests exercise genuine edge cases (empty, whitespace, exact-boundary, custom wpm) against the real wordCount+Math.ceil logic; no existing tests deleted or weakened, no hard-coded expected values.
checklist.label: No test-gaming / faking

checklist.detail: Pure function, no side effects, no changes to wordCount behavior, division-by-zero guarded by early return for zero words, well-documented, zero regression or security risk.
checklist.label: Safe to advance

checklist.detail: at or above the confidence bar
checklist.label: Judge confidence

dimensions.evidence: Exports estimateReadingTime(text, wordsPerMinute=200): number from the same module, uses wordCount internally, Math.ceil rounding, returns 0 for empty/whitespace, default 200 wpm — fully matches the acceptance criteria and definition of done.
Only 3 files changed: new implementation file, one-line re-export in index.ts, and a new test block appended to index.test.ts with a minor header update. No unrelated churn.
Tests exercise genuine edge cases (empty, whitespace, exact-boundary, custom wpm) against the real wordCount+Math.ceil logic; no existing tests deleted or weakened, no hard-coded expected values.
Pure function, no side effects, no changes to wordCount behavior, division-by-zero guarded by early return for zero words, well-documented, zero regression or security risk.
